fashion with fresh designs.

Fresh looks, bold ideas.

shop on etsy

We've launched our first online shop and are live on Etsy with worldwide shipping so you can buy our products from anywhere in the world. The first collection we're releasing is six World Cup retro tops that celebrate iconic moments in the build up to this year's tournament. More exciting new designs are in the works and we will be launching them very soon too.

Shop Now

We love using our creativity create moments of joy as part of the slakka family of products and services. Please contact us if you have any ideas or feedback.
